title: Browse Jobs
noOpeningsInRegion: No openings in this region. Try selecting a different region above.
live_application_exists: You already have an active application at this company. You can only have one open application per company at a time.
already_applied: You have already applied to this opening.
cool_off_active: You applied to this company recently. Please wait until the cool-off period ends before applying again.
not_a_connection: You can only apply to this opening through a connection at the company.
invalid_resume: Your resume could not be accepted. Please upload a valid PDF.
nominateEndorsersHelp: Pick connections who can vouch for your work. They'll be asked to write an endorsement for this application.
noConnectionsToEndorse: You have no connections yet to nominate.
notifyColleagues: Notify my connections who work at this company
notifyColleaguesHelp: Lets colleagues you're connected with at this company know you've applied, so they can endorse you.
coverLetterPlaceholder: Tell us why you are a great fit for this role (100-5000 characters)
